seoTitle: YMTC News & Updates | 3D NAND Flash Technology | LiTong
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from YMTC including new product releases, technology breakthroughs, and industry insights. Stay informed about 3D NAND flash memory innovations.

news.title: YMTC Announces Xtacking 4.0 Architecture with 232-Layer 3D NAND
news.summary: YMTC unveils its fifth-generation 3D NAND technology featuring 232 layers and the advanced Xtacking 4.0 architecture, delivering industry-leading storage density and performance.
content: YMTC has officially announced the launch of its latest Xtacking 4.0 architecture, powering the new X4-9070 series 232-layer 3D NAND flash memory. This represents a significant milestone in YMTC's technology roadmap and positions the company at the forefront of 3D NAND innovation.
The Xtacking 4.0 architecture introduces several breakthrough innovations:
- **232-Layer Design**: Industry-leading layer count delivering up to 1Tb per die capacity
- **Center X-DEC Technology**: Reduces word line capacitance by 50%, improving performance and power efficiency
- **1600MT/s I/O Speed**: Industry-leading interface speed for high-performance applications
- **Enhanced Yield**: Improved manufacturing efficiency through advanced process integration
- Storage Density: Up to 1Tb per die

This launch reinforces YMTC's position as a leading innovator in 3D NAND technology. The X4-9070 series is ideal for enterprise SSDs, high-performance consumer storage, and advanced mobile applications. LiTong is ready to support customers with design-in assistance, samples, and production supply.
Contact our FAE team to learn more about integrating YMTC's latest NAND technology into your storage solutions.

news.title: YMTC and Partners Release Enterprise SSD Reference Design
news.summary: New reference design enables rapid development of high-performance enterprise SSDs using YMTC X4-9070 NAND, featuring PCIe Gen4 x4 interface and up to 7GB/s performance.
content: YMTC has collaborated with leading SSD controller manufacturers to release a comprehensive enterprise SSD reference design based on the X4-9070 232-layer TLC NAND. This reference design accelerates time-to-market for enterprise storage solutions.
The enterprise SSD reference design features:
- **Performance**: Up to 7,000 MB/s sequential read, 1M IOPS random read
- **Power Loss Protection**: Integrated power-loss protection circuitry
This reference design is optimized for:

LiTong provides comprehensive support for customers implementing this reference design, including schematic review, layout guidance, firmware integration assistance, and thermal analysis. Our FAE team has hands-on experience with YMTC-based SSD designs and can help optimize your implementation.

news.title: YMTC Automotive NAND Achieves AEC-Q100 Grade 2 Qualification
news.summary: YMTC's automotive-grade 3D NAND flash memory successfully completes AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualification, enabling use in automotive infotainment, ADAS, and digital cluster applications.
content: YMTC has announced that its automotive-grade 3D NAND flash memory has successfully achieved AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualification, meeting the stringent reliability requirements of the automotive industry.
- **Reliability**: Extended endurance and data retention testing
- **Quality**: Comprehensive failure analysis and process control
YMTC automotive NAND is suitable for:
- **Infotainment Systems**: High-capacity storage for multimedia content
- **ADAS**: Reliable storage for sensor data and map information
- **Digital Clusters**: Fast boot and display data storage
- **Telematics**: Data logging and over-the-air update storage
LiTong can provide AEC-Q100 documentation, PPAP support, and automotive application engineering services for customers designing with YMTC automotive NAND products.

news.title: YMTC Xtacking Technology Wins Best of Show at Flash Memory Summit
news.summary: YMTC's innovative Xtacking architecture receives industry recognition with the prestigious Best of Show award at Flash Memory Summit 2024.
content: YMTC's Xtacking 3D NAND architecture has been honored with the Best of Show award at Flash Memory Summit 2024, one of the most prestigious recognitions in the memory industry. This award highlights YMTC's significant contributions to 3D NAND technology innovation.
The Flash Memory Summit Best of Show award recognizes outstanding innovations in flash memory technology. Winners are selected by a panel of industry experts based on:
- **Xtacking Architecture**: Revolutionary wafer-bonding approach enabling superior performance
- **Rapid Technology Advancement**: Progression from 64-layer to 232-layer in record time
- **Industry Leadership**: Establishing China as a major player in advanced memory technology
- **Cost Efficiency**: Delivering competitive solutions without compromising performance

This recognition validates YMTC's technology leadership and strengthens its position in the global NAND flash market. The award demonstrates that YMTC's innovations are competitive with established international suppliers.
LiTong congratulates YMTC on this achievement and remains committed to bringing these award-winning technologies to our customers with full technical support and reliable supply chain services.

news.title: YMTC Launches eMMC and UFS Embedded Storage Solutions
news.summary: New embedded storage portfolio brings YMTC NAND technology to mobile and IoT applications with eMMC 5.1 and UFS 2.2/3.1 solutions.
content: YMTC has expanded its product portfolio with the launch of embedded storage solutions, including eMMC 5.1 and UFS 2.2/3.1 products based on its advanced 3D NAND technology. This expansion targets the rapidly growing mobile and IoT storage markets.
- **Features**: Enhanced strobe, cache, and power-off notification
- **Target Applications**: Entry-level smartphones, tablets, IoT devices
- Features: Write booster, deep sleep, performance throttling
LiTong provides design support, samples, and production supply for YMTC embedded storage solutions. Contact our mobile storage specialists for application guidance.

news.title: YMTC Introduces Industrial Temperature Grade NAND Products
news.summary: New industrial-grade NAND flash memory products support extended temperature range from -40°C to +85°C for industrial and networking applications.
content: YMTC has introduced industrial temperature grade versions of its popular 3D NAND products, specifically designed for demanding industrial, networking, and embedded applications that require reliable operation across wide temperature ranges.
- **Enhanced Endurance**: Higher P/E cycle ratings for industrial workloads
LiTong provides specialized support for industrial applications:
Contact our industrial product specialists for detailed specifications and application support.
